object_a.label: floor pattern
object_a.description: hardwood floor running from foreground through doorway
object_a.long_form_open_description: Medium-tone polished hardwood flooring with visible planks running roughly lengthwise toward the hallway. Floor transitions uninterrupted through the doorway to the interior door at the far end; warm brown color.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: extends beneath rug and table in left foreground and continues through the centered doorway toward the closed interior door
object_a.object_text_short: hardwood floor running from foreground through doorway
object_a.object_text_long: center sector | Medium-tone polished hardwood flooring with visible planks running roughly lengthwise toward the hallway. Floor transitions uninterrupted through the doorway to the interior door at the far end; warm brown color.

object_b.label: floor pattern
object_b.description: hardwood flooring in foreground and kitchen walkway
object_b.long_form_open_description: Warm medium-brown hardwood planks with visible grain running lengthwise from foreground toward the kitchen. Occupies left/center foreground and transitions to carpet further into the living area. Floor shows minor reflections and a polished finish.
object_b.location_relative_to_other_objects: Covers the foreground and leads up to the kitchen island; meets the beige carpet at the living area boundary to the right.
